tagline: Therapeutic bodywork and aromatherapy massage in Petaluma
seoDescription: Essential Massage Therapy in Petaluma, CA offers deep tissue, prenatal, hot stone, couples, and aromatherapy massage with custom essential-oil blends and cupping. Rated 5 stars on Yelp.
heroHeading: Massage therapy that meets your body where it is
heroSubheading: A calm Petaluma studio for deep tissue, prenatal, hot stone, and aromatherapy bodywork — tailored to what you need that day.
highlights: Rated 5.0 on Yelp and 4.8 on Google
Custom aromatherapy blends of essential oils and herbal extracts
Deep tissue, prenatal, hot stone, and couples massage
Add cupping, gua sha, exfoliation, or hot stones to any session
Open seven days a week, mornings through evening
aboutBody: Essential Massage Therapy is a Petaluma studio built around one idea: a good massage should be tailored to you, not run from a script. Owner and therapist BinBin and the team work with each client to choose the right pressure and technique, whether that means easing deep muscle tension, supporting a pregnancy, or simply unwinding after a long week.

Sessions can be enhanced with custom aromatherapy blends, hot stones, cupping, gua sha, or exfoliation. The room is kept serene and unhurried, and the studio is open seven days a week so it is easy to find a time that works. A second location serves the Santa Rosa area.

services.title: Deep Tissue Massage
services.description: Focused, firmer pressure that releases chronic muscle tension and knots in the back, shoulders, and neck.

services.title: Aromatherapy Massage
services.description: A relaxing full-body massage paired with a customized blend of essential oils and herbal extracts chosen for you.

services.title: Prenatal Massage
services.description: Gentle, supportive bodywork that eases the aches of pregnancy and helps you rest more comfortably.

services.title: Hot Stone Massage
services.description: Warm stones glide over tight muscles to melt away tension — a deeply relaxing way to finish or feature a session.

services.title: Couples Massage
services.description: Two therapists, one room — unwind side by side with a partner or friend.

services.title: Cupping & Gua Sha
services.description: Traditional add-on techniques that boost circulation and relieve stubborn tension, available with any massage.

testimonials.quote: BinBin was my massage therapist and she was amazing. She was on time, thorough, prompt, considerate, and so skilled at massage.
testimonials.author: Verified review · Petaluma

testimonials.quote: BinBin the owner is so knowledgeable on aromatherapy and cupping — she really knows how to use it and it works.
testimonials.author: Verified review · Petaluma

testimonials.quote: Lucy used hot stones on my back at the end, which is an exceptionally relaxing experience. Both BinBin and Lucy are some of the most skilled and present massage therapists I have been to.
testimonials.author: Verified review · Petaluma

notes: Verified 2026-06-23. Sources: essential-mt.com (home/about/services/contact), Fresha booking page (service menu: deep tissue, prenatal, hot stone, couples, reflexology, lymphatic drainage, cupping, etc.), Yelp (5.0 / ~61-62 reviews, real quotes re BinBin & Lucy), Google (4.8 / 34). Owner/therapist = BinBin; Lucy also on team. Hours verified (Mon-Fri 9:30a-8p, Sat-Sun 10a-8p). Second location serves Santa Rosa (707-206-1621). Founding year NOT verified — left blank (FB page created ~early 2024 but unconfirmed; do not assert). Add-ons confirmed: aromatherapy, Chinese herbal medicine, exfoliation, hot stones, sea salt, cupping. CAMTC cert not found online — omitted.
